Record Class RagbotProperties

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
com.embabel.examples.ragbot.RagbotProperties
Record Components:
chatLlm - model selection and generation parameters for chat responses
objective - objective template name describing what the assistant should accomplish
voice - persona configuration describing how the assistant should communicate
chunkerConfig - chunking settings used during document ingestion for RAG
uiPort - port used by the optional Javelit web chat UI
uiCssPath - resource path to CSS used by the Javelit UI header file
@ConfigurationProperties(prefix="ragbot") public record RagbotProperties(@NestedConfigurationProperty com.embabel.common.ai.model.LlmOptions chatLlm, String objective, @NestedConfigurationProperty RagbotProperties.Voice voice, @NestedConfigurationProperty com.embabel.agent.rag.ingestion.ContentChunker.Config chunkerConfig, int uiPort, String uiCssPath) extends Record
Holds externalized configuration for the Ragbot application.

Spring Boot binds values under ragbot.* into this immutable record. Using a record here is a best practice for learning projects because it keeps configuration strongly typed, explicit, and thread-safe by default.

    static final record 
    RagbotProperties.Voice
    Voice/persona settings that control response style.

  • Constructor Details

    • RagbotProperties

      public RagbotProperties(com.embabel.common.ai.model.LlmOptions chatLlm, String objective, RagbotProperties.Voice voice, com.embabel.agent.rag.ingestion.ContentChunker.Config chunkerConfig, @DefaultValue("8888") int uiPort, @DefaultValue("classpath:ui/chat.css") String uiCssPath)
      Creates an instance of a RagbotProperties record class.
      Parameters:
      chatLlm - the value for the chatLlm record component
      objective - the value for the objective record component
      voice - the value for the voice record component
      chunkerConfig - the value for the chunkerConfig record component
      uiPort - the value for the uiPort record component
      uiCssPath - the value for the uiCssPath record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
